dateline: Tokyo, Japan — BTS Wraps Tokyo Dome 2-Night Run; ARIRANG World Tour Advances to North America
heroHeadline: BTS Tokyo Dome Complete: 110,000 Fans, Global Reviews — Tour Heads to Tampa April 25
heroSubtitle: 4,693 days since debut: BTS completes the Tokyo Dome 2-night run (April 17–18, 2026) — 110,000 fans over two sold-out nights, their first Japan concerts in ~7 years. Japan Times and Starnews Korea publish glowing reviews; BTS calls it 'so happy and overjoyed.' ARIRANG remains historic at 3 consecutive Billboard 200 No. 1 weeks (K-pop first). The Arirang World Tour advances to North America — Raymond James Stadium, Tampa, FL on April 25–28.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Yonhap, setlist.fm, Japan Times, Starnews Korea, Korea Herald, and Recording Academy.
